programme.desc: S27 E03 — The Runaways A driverless vehicle goes into an apartment complex; a suspect isn't fast enough to evade police; officers stumble upon a 7-year-old boy who left home alone.
programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: S27 E04 — Perfume Takedown A fleeing thief runs into a patrolman; an armed-robbery victim gives a colorful overview of surveillance footage; returning tearful children to their mother.
programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: S27 E05 — Put Your Clothes Back On Trying to get a naked man to cooperate; a pickup truck chase with a 14-year-old; loads of dope on routine traffic stop.
programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: S27 E06 — Tazed and Confused Taking desperate measures when a suspect will not stop fighting; constraining a man trying to flee with crack; a tearful driver with weed in the car.
programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: S01 E05 — The DuPonts When young Lammot du Pont pushes his company to get out of the business of war, it sets off a conflict that transforms not only the family but American industry for generations.
programme.title: American Dynasty

programme.desc: S01 E07 — The Kennedys Joe Kennedy is the grandson of Irish immigrants who, after graduating from Harvard, conquers Wall Street and Hollywood; when his own political career is cut short, he focuses on his children -- one becomes president.

programme.title: How America Works
